entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for downy mildew resistance

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting pearl millet caused by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: GAMMA-IRRADIATION
entities.description: A technique used to induce mutations in seeds to develop resistant lines

entities.name: TIFTON
entities.description: A research location in Georgia, USA

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A research location in India

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the time to reach 50% flowering

entities.name: INFLORESCENCE LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the length of the inflorescence

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the height of the plant

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the proportion of ovules that develop into seeds

entities.name: NUMBER OF INTERNODES
entities.description: A morphological character counting the number of internodes

entities.name: LEAF SHEATH LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the length of the leaf sheath

entities.name: PEDUNCLE LENGTH
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the length of the peduncle

entities.name: NUMBER OF EFFECTIVE TILLERS PER PLANT
entities.description: A morphological character counting the number of tillers that produce seeds

entities.name: INFLORESCENCE DIAMETER
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the diameter of the inflorescence

entities.name: SEED MASS
entities.description: A morphological character measuring the mass of the seeds

entities.name: INTERNODE LENGTH PATTERN
entities.description: A morphological character describing the pattern of internode lengths

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that confer resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: PLEIOTROPIC EFFECTS
entities.description: The phenomenon where one gene influences multiple seemingly unrelated phenotypic traits

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material from one species or variety into another

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant is male sterile due to cytoplasmic factors
